title: Challenge
description: A single playable VWLSS puzzle containing exactly eight clue-answer pairs.

category.description: Category shown to the player. Must not be empty or whitespace-only and may use only ordinary spaces for whitespace. Visible Unicode content such as non-Latin scripts, emoji, and decorative symbols is allowed.

shareClueIndex.description: Zero-based index of the clue used for share cards.

answer.description: Full solution text. Must contain at least one uppercase letter and may use uppercase letters with diacritics, punctuation, and spaces.

clue.description: Consonant skeleton shown to the player. Must contain at least one uppercase consonant and use only uppercase consonants and spaces.
